recommendations.title: Billionaire Boys Club
recommendations.overview: A group of wealthy boys in Los Angeles during the early 1980s establishes a get rich quick scam that turns deadly.

recommendations.title: Straight A's
recommendations.overview: Pressured by his late mother's ghost to return home to the family he abandoned, a former addict grabs a bag of pills and a sack of marijuana and hits the road to Shreveport.

recommendations.title: Rashomon
recommendations.overview: Four people recount different versions of the story of a man's murder and the rape of his wife.

recommendations.title: Sherlock: The Abominable Bride
recommendations.genres: Crime, Drama, Mystery, Thriller, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: Sherlock Holmes and Dr. Watson find themselves in 1890s London in this holiday special.

recommendations.title: Kiss Kiss Bang Bang
recommendations.overview: A petty thief posing as an actor is brought to Los Angeles for an unlikely audition and finds himself in the middle of a murder investigation along with his high school dream girl and a detective who's been training him for his upcoming role...

recommendations.title: Sherlock Holmes
recommendations.overview: Eccentric consulting detective Sherlock Holmes and Doctor John Watson battle to bring down a new nemesis and unravel a deadly plot that could destroy England.

recommendations.title: The Nice Guys
recommendations.overview: A private eye investigates the apparent suicide of a fading porn star in 1970s Los Angeles and uncovers a conspiracy.

recommendations.title: Highway
recommendations.overview: Jack is caught with the wife of his employer, a Vegas thug. The thug sends goons after Jack, who convinces his best friend, Pilot, to flee with him. Pilot insists that they head for Seattle, but doesn't tell Jack why. The goons learn from Pilot's dru

recommendations.title: Enola Holmes 2
recommendations.overview: Now a detective-for-hire like her infamous brother, Enola Holmes takes on her first official case to find a missing girl, as the sparks of a dangerous conspiracy ignite a mystery that requires the help of friends — and Sherlock himself — to unravel.

recommendations.title: Insomnia
recommendations.overview: Two Los Angeles homicide detectives are dispatched to a northern town where the sun doesn't set to investigate the methodical murder of a local teen.
